case_number: Constitution Petition is disposed of as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D-2477 of 2025 Date Order with signature of the Judge Hearing 1. For orders on office objection No. 1 to 5 2. For hearing of main case. 18.07.2025 Mr. Ameeruddin Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Abrar Ali Khichi, Addl.PG *************** After arguing at some length, learned counsel for the Petitioner submitted that he would be satisfied and would not press the instant constitutional petition if the directions are given to learned trial Court to conclude the trial within shortest possible time; this proposal is not opposed by the learned Additional Prosecutor General. In view of above, the instant Constitution Petition is disposed of as not pressed with directions to the learned trial Court to conclude trial of the case within 60 days. If trial Court feels that any witness fails to appear, trial Court is at liberty to issue coercive process against them for recording their evidence. J U D G E J U D G E brohips
